heading: Articles returned from space not to be construed as importation
label: 1484a Articles returned from space not to be construed as importation
notes: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to articles launched into space from the customs territory of the United States on or after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1984 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 1985section 214(c)(4) of Pub. L. 98–573section 1304 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to articles launched into space from the customs territory of the United States on or after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1984 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 1985section 214(c)(4) of Pub. L. 98–573section 1304 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: wholly by United States persons, or

children.label: B
children.text: in substantial part by United States persons, or
such articles were maintained or utilized while in space solely on board such spacecraft or aboard another spacecraft which meets the requirements of paragraph (1)(A) through (C) of this section; and

such articles were returned to the customs territory directly from space aboard such spacecraft or aboard another spacecraft which meets the requirements of paragraph (1)(A) through (C) of this section;
